query: Build a tool that syncs our user data from Stripe to our Postgres database.
expected_behavior: Runs check_guards.py on the target database tables before writing any sync logic
Implements idempotency: running the sync twice does not create duplicate records
Handles API pagination in the Stripe data fetch — does not silently truncate at the first page
Produces structured output (JSON) with a summary: records synced, records skipped, errors
Validates the Stripe API response schema before writing to Postgres — does not trust external APIs blindly
